strategy: High-health Khrysalis fight (18,365) with a Wraith Knight and Deer Mouse Revenant already out. Bring a team with a hitter, supports, and a healer.
At the end of Round 1 she summons another Deer Mouse Revenant, so expect the board to fill. Decide whether to AoE the minions down or funnel one big hit through them onto her.
She is not stunnable. Her Shadow Seraph gives +15 Backlash, so shadow-form hitters take extra backlash. Have non-shadow damage ready or heal the backlash.
Supports blade the hitter and Feint Elana; the healer covers the Deer Mouse and Wraith Knight hits.
Set up 2-3 rounds, then the hitter lands an AoE so the minions die alongside her.
cheatNotes: Her only listed cheat is summoning a Deer Mouse Revenant at the end of Round 1. Plan for one extra minion and either AoE it down or push a single hit through to her.
